---
title: "nitrix.stats.betareg"
generated: true
signature-hash: e1bbec463cd8d264
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.betareg`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `BetaResult` {#BetaResult}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BetaResult -->
```python
class BetaResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BetaResult -->
Per-element beta-regression fit output.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BetaResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef: Float[Array, 'V p'], precision: Float[Array, 'V'], cov_unscaled: Float[Array, 'V p p'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], n_obs: int) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `beta_fit` {#beta_fit}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:beta_fit -->
```python
beta_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, n_iter: int = 50, ridge: float = 1e-08, block: Optional[int] = None) -> BetaResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:beta_fit -->
Mass-univariate beta regression (logit link, estimated precision).

Fits, per element, `y_v ~ Beta(mu phi, (1 - mu) phi)` with `mu =
logit^{-1}(X beta_v)` and a per-element precision `phi_v`, by
Ferrari-Cribari-Neto Fisher scoring.  Responses must lie strictly in
`(0, 1)` (values are clipped off the boundary by `1e-8`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:beta_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` responses in `(0, 1)`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` shared design (include your own intercept). |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `50` | Fisher-scoring iterations (default `50`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Small stabiliser on the normal equations. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory. |

**Returns** `BetaResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `beta_predict` {#beta_predict}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:beta_predict -->
```python
beta_predict(result: BetaResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, type: Literal['response', 'link'] = 'response') -> Float[Array, 'V N']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:beta_predict -->
Per-element beta-regression prediction on a (new) design `X`.

The :func:`beta_fit` analogue of :func:`nitrix.stats.predict`: the mean
model is the logit link, so `type='link'` returns the linear predictor
`eta = X beta` and `type='response'` (default) returns the fitted mean
`mu = expit(eta)` in `(0, 1)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:beta_predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `BetaResult` | — | — | A :class:`BetaResult` from :func:`beta_fit`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` design (same columns as the fit). |
| `type` | `Literal['response', 'link']` | — | `'response'` | `'response'` (the mean `mu`) or `'link'` (the linear predictor `eta`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V` × `N`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
